$comment: Curated static example authored by the top-level AI from the current inventory. This file was not generated by a runtime golden-flow execution.

transitions.primaryNavigation: Client-side navigation switches the workspace between Overview, Incidents, and Services.
transitions.periodSelection: Selecting 7, 30, or 90 days updates fixture-backed availability, latency, error budget, request-volume bars, and labels.
transitions.incidentInspection: Selecting an incident opens its detail Dialog.
transitions.incidentResolution: Resolve is a client-only transition: it marks the selected incident resolved, closes the Dialog, lowers the active count, and restores the affected service when no active incident remains.
